subsidyType: citywide replacement program funded through DWSRF city crews and contracted replacement work
publicSideCovered: yes the city coordinates public-side replacement as part of scheduled work
privateSideCovered: yes eligible homeowners can receive private-side replacement at no cost
propertyRules: eligible homes inside the City of Jackson can sign up early or are contacted when replacement is scheduled in their area
contractorRules: city crews or city contractors perform the work after property access and the temporary license are granted
